issues.title: Incorrect revenue calculation
issues.problem: Revenue should only include transactions with status 'COMPLETED'.
issues.fix: SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'COMPLETED' THEN t.amount ELSE 0 END) AS revenue_usd

issues.title: Lack of comments
issues.problem: The query lacks comments explaining the purpose and logic.
issues.fix: Add comments explaining the purpose and logic of each part of the query.

review.corrected_sql:
SELECT c.customer_name,
c.email,
m.merchant_name,
SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'COMPLETED' THEN t.amount ELSE 0 END) AS revenue_usd,
COUNT(*) AS transaction_count
FROM fact_transactions t
JOIN dim_customer c
  ON t.customer_id = c.customer_id
JOIN dim_merchant m
  ON t.merchant_id = m.merchant_id
WHERE t.transaction_date >= '2024-01-01'
GROUP BY c.customer_name,
c.email,
m.merchant_name
ORDER BY revenue_usd DESC;
review.summary: The query had a critical correctness issue with revenue calculation and lacked readability due to missing comments.
